title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Stryker India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Stryker India
jsonLd.description:
Stryker India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Stryker India:
Stryker India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Stryker India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
